summary: Substrate memory fully implemented with SQLite persistence, rolling window compression, MEGA/HYPER consolidation, and strong user isolation.

client_side.scope: Browser-local; sessions and messages survive refresh
client_side.note: Server never sees session lists, titles, or organization — only individual messages sent for LLM inference

consolidation.mega: 5+ DTUs on same topic → MEGA DTU

cross_session_persistence.mechanism: Conversation DTUs stored in STATE.dtus (SQLite-backed); retrieved by semantic search in next session via chat-context-pipeline.js:272-278

style_inheritance.mechanism: On first message of new session, inherits style vector from most recent chat_mega DTU

mechanisms: Emergent consent filter: filterByEmergentConsent() in chat-context-pipeline.js:276
